mapper.select: select d.deceased_id, d.org_id, d.family_user_id, d.name, d.gender, d.birth_date, d.death_date, d.cemetery_area, d.cemetery_number, d.bio, d.cover_image, d.qrcode_code, d.qrcode_url, d.is_public, d.allow_message, d.message_audit, d.status, d.del_flag, d.remark, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time, o.org_name from mem_deceased d left join mem_organization o on d.org_id = o.org_id where d.deceased_id = #{deceasedId} and d.del_flag = '0'

select d.deceased_id, d.org_id, d.family_user_id, d.name, d.gender, d.birth_date, d.death_date, d.cemetery_area, d.cemetery_number, d.bio, d.cover_image, d.qrcode_code, d.qrcode_url, d.is_public, d.allow_message, d.message_audit, d.status, d.del_flag, d.remark, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time, o.org_name from mem_deceased d left join mem_organization o on d.org_id = o.org_id where d.qrcode_code = #{qrcodeCode} and d.del_flag = '0'

select d.deceased_id, d.org_id, d.family_user_id, d.name, d.gender, d.birth_date, d.death_date, d.cemetery_area, d.cemetery_number, d.bio, d.cover_image, d.qrcode_code, d.qrcode_url, d.is_public, d.allow_message, d.message_audit, d.status, d.del_flag, d.remark, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time, o.org_name from mem_deceased d left join mem_organization o on d.org_id = o.org_id where d.family_user_id = #{familyUserId} and d.del_flag = '0' order by d.create_time desc
select count(*) from mem_deceased where org_id = #{orgId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: -- 这里如果需要可以增加访问计数字段，暂时先留空，实际统计通过统计表获取 select 1
mapper.insert: insert into mem_deceased (org_id, family_user_id, name, gender, birth_date, death_date, cemetery_area, cemetery_number, bio, cover_image, qrcode_code, qrcode_url, is_public, allow_message, message_audit, status, del_flag, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{orgId}, #{familyUserId}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{deathDate}, #{cemeteryArea}, #{cemeteryNumber}, #{bio}, #{coverImage}, #{qrcodeCode}, #{qrcodeUrl}, #{isPublic}, #{allowMessage}, #{messageAudit}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.update:
update mem_deceased
org_id = #{orgId}, family_user_id = #{familyUserId}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, death_date = #{deathDate}, cemetery_area = #{cemeteryArea}, cemetery_number = #{cemeteryNumber}, bio = #{bio}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, qrcode_code = #{qrcodeCode}, qrcode_url = #{qrcodeUrl}, is_public = #{isPublic}, allow_message = #{allowMessage}, message_audit = #{messageAudit}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime},
where deceased_id = #{deceasedId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete: update mem_deceased set del_flag = '2' where deceased_id = #{deceasedId}

update mem_deceased set del_flag = '2' where deceased_id in
#{deceasedId}
